mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id AS object_id, 'user' AS object_type, u.user_name AS object_name, u.user_code AS object_code, uo.org_id AS org_id, o.org_name AS org_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgao.object_type = 'user' AND pgao.authorized_object_id = u.user_id ) THEN true ELSE false END AS authorized FROM po_users u LEFT JOIN po_users_organization uo ON u.user_id = uo.user_id LEFT JOIN po_organization o ON uo.org_id = o.org_id
u.status_cd = 'A'
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.objectName}, '%')
AND uo.org_id = #{query.orgId}
ORDER BY u.user_name

SELECT o.org_id AS object_id, 'org' AS object_type, o.org_name AS object_name, o.org_code AS object_code, o.parent_org_id AS org_id, po.org_name AS org_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgao.object_type = 'org' AND pgao.authorized_object_id = o.org_id ) THEN true ELSE false END AS authorized FROM po_organization o LEFT JOIN po_organization po ON o.parent_org_id = po.org_id
AND o.org_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.objectName}, '%')
AND (o.org_id = #{query.orgId} OR o.parent_org_id = #{query.orgId})
ORDER BY o.org_name

SELECT u.user_id AS object_id, 'user' AS object_type, u.user_name AS object_name, u.user_code AS object_code, uo.org_id AS org_id, o.org_name AS org_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgao.object_type = 'user' AND pgao.authorized_object_id = u.user_id ) THEN true ELSE false END AS authorized FROM po_users u LEFT JOIN po_users_organization uo ON u.user_id = uo.user_id LEFT JOIN po_organization o ON uo.org_id = o.org_id
u.status_cd = 'A'
AND u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.objectName}, '%')
AND uo.org_id = #{query.orgId}
ORDER BY u.user_name LIMIT 100

SELECT o.org_id AS object_id, 'org' AS object_type, o.org_name AS object_name, o.org_code AS object_code, o.parent_org_id AS org_id, po.org_name AS org_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pgao WHERE pgao.permission_group_id = #{query.permissionGroupId} AND pgao.object_type = 'org' AND pgao.authorized_object_id = o.org_id ) THEN true ELSE false END AS authorized FROM po_organization o LEFT JOIN po_organization po ON o.parent_org_id = po.org_id
AND o.org_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.objectName}, '%')
AND (o.org_id = #{query.orgId} OR o.parent_org_id = #{query.orgId})
ORDER BY o.org_name LIMIT 100
